# Mali Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Mali's administrative hierarchy:
> 20 regions, 160 circles, 474 arrondissements, 816 communes.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total regions: 20
- Total circles: 160
- Total arrondissements: 474
- Total communes: 816
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-27
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All regions (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-region.json)
- [All circles (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-cercle.json)
- [All arrondissements (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-arrondissement.json)
- [All communes (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-commune.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Region

- [Kayes](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/kayes-ml01/) — 10 circles, 33 arrondissements, 65 communes
- [Koulikoro](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/koulikoro-ml02/) — 8 circles, 26 arrondissements, 58 communes
- [Sikasso](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/sikasso-ml03/) — 8 circles, 13 arrondissements, 36 communes
- [Segou](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/segou-ml04/) — 11 circles, 28 arrondissements, 54 communes
- [Mopti](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/mopti-ml05/) — 8 circles, 34 arrondissements, 50 communes
- [Timbuktu](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/timbuktu-ml06/) — 13 circles, 30 arrondissements, 47 communes
- [Gao](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/gao-ml07/) — 16 circles, 37 arrondissements, 40 communes
- [Kidal](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/kidal-ml08/) — 9 circles, 29 arrondissements, 30 communes
- [Taoudenni](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/taoudenni-ml09/) — 6 circles, 30 arrondissements, 30 communes
- [Ménaka](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/mnaka-ml10/) — 6 circles, 18 arrondissements, 27 communes
- [Nioro](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nioro-ml11/) — 6 circles, 4 arrondissements, 10 communes
- [Kita](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/kita-ml12/) — 6 circles, 14 arrondissements, 33 communes
- [Dioïla](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/diola-ml13/) — 6 circles, 13 arrondissements, 23 communes
- [Nara](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/nara-ml14/) — 6 circles, 12 arrondissements, 14 communes
- [Bougouni](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bougouni-ml15/) — 10 circles, 22 arrondissements, 41 communes
- [Koutiala](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/koutiala-ml16/) — 8 circles, 22 arrondissements, 46 communes
- [San](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/san-ml17/) — 7 circles, 17 arrondissements, 42 communes
- [Douentza](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/douentza-ml18/) — 6 circles, 15 arrondissements, 21 communes
- [Bandiagara](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bandiagara-ml19/) — 9 circles, 28 arrondissements, 48 communes
- [Bamako](https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/bamako-ml20/) — 1 circles, 0 arrondissements, 0 communes

- [Ménaka](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/mnaka-ml10.txt)
- [Nioro](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/nioro-ml11.txt)

- [Koutiala](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/koutiala-ml16.txt)
- [San](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/san-ml17.txt)
- [Douentza](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/douentza-ml18.txt)
- [Bandiagara](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/bandiagara-ml19.txt)
- [Bamako](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/bamako-ml20.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (region), 2 (circle), 3 (arrondissement), 4 (commune)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Mali Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/mali-administrative-divisions
